name: Asian Network
notes:
We are a District ISP operating under ASN-137385 in Bangladesh, committed to enhancing the overall internet experience for our subscribers. Our primary goal is to ensure customer satisfaction by delivering high-speed, reliable internet access across the country.

To achieve this, we actively pursue peering opportunities with leading content providers and CDN networks. By establishing direct connectivity with platforms such as Google Global Cache, Akamai, Netflix, Meta, and Microsoft, we aim to significantly improve latency, streaming quality, and overall browsing performance.

Our continuous focus is on delivering faster content access, seamless video streaming, and an optimized internet experience for users throughout Bangladesh.
